name: 偏心父親×兄弟鬩牆
description: Hamilton父親將兩個兒子當工具培養，偏愛Tristan導致Josh走上極端，父子三人的對峙戲充滿了權力與親情的撕裂。

examples.drama_title: love drama "I was tricked into marrying a blind CEO I didn't know" HD FULL, CEO,ENGSUB,  Episodes
examples.excerpt: How can you compare yourself to Tristan? You've never done anything that satisfied me. / You always told us that you would treat us the same, right? You gave me hope time and time again. And you denied me again and again.
examples.context: Hamilton父親將兩個兒子當工具培養，偏愛Tristan導致Josh走上極端，父子三人的對峙戲充滿了權力與親情的撕裂。
